[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101110101 6
1 1011011000 5
2 0110100101 5
3 0000100101 3
4 1001101100 5
5 1011010000 4
6 0010111011 6
7 1111100111 8
